creator: adam@whizkidtech.net
text:
The VGA font for iso2 that is currently distributed with FreeBSD
(iso02-8x16.fnt) is an old font with a problem: It shrinks all
capital letters when it fits an accent mark over them. That is not
in line with traditional typography of languages using iso2 charset.

I have derived a new VGA font which looks just like the old one but
does not shrink the caps. I am not suggesting it should necessarily
replace the old font - you may offer people a choice. However, I do
suggest to make my font the default iso2 8x16 font when installing
FreeBSD and choosing an iso2 language.
